title: Featured Projects
description: A collection of my most recent and notable projects. Each project showcases my skills in turning ideas into functional and beautiful applications.

projects.name: Waskita Karya Corporate Website
projects.description: The official corporate website of PT Waskita Karya (Persero) Tbk. Contributed as Fullstack & DevSecOps Engineer ensuring performance, scalability, and security.

projects.name: HokBen Mobile and Website Company
projects.description: The HokBen mobile app for Android and iOS. Contributed as a React Native Developer integrating with Spring Boot backend.

projects.name: Trac To Go Mobile
projects.description: Rental service mobile app (iOS & Android). Implemented CI/CD, performance improvements, new features, and bug fixes.

projects.name: ProSpark - Transforms Learning
projects.description: Learning platform mobile app for Android & iOS. Worked as a React Native Developer delivering features and improvements.

projects.name: Task Management Tool
projects.description: Mobile app for Android & iOS. Contributed as a React Native Developer building features and integrations.

projects.name: IndiHome Smart
projects.description: iOS mobile app for smart home services. Contributed as an iOS Native Developer using Swift 5 and Xcode.

projects.name: Genioo
projects.description: E-commerce mobile app for Android. Worked as Fullstack Developer with React Native, CodeIgniter, and MySQL.

projects.name: E-Recycle
projects.description: Mobile recycling app for Android & iOS. Developed using Android Studio and Java, focusing on eco-friendly waste management.

projects.name: Admin SiPitung Dashboard
projects.description: Web-based dashboard to manage users and monitor activities for SiPitung. Developed as a React JS Developer.
